title: Setting Schema
description: The specific, instantiated place and time where a slice of the story occurs.

location_ref.description: ID of the broader Location from the World & Lore bucket.

time_period.description: When this setting takes place (e.g., 'Late 4th Era', 'Winter of 1042').

local_political_tensions.description: Immediate issues dominating the local environment.

immediate_material_conditions.description: e.g., 'Grain stores are low in this specific district due to the siege.'
